text:
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
1 = T-MSIS taxonomy code 
2 = Provider specialty code 
3 = Provider type code 
4 = Authorized category of service code 
N = NPPES primary taxonomy code (derived by joining provider ID to the CMS National Plan and 
Provider Enumeration System [NPPES]) 

COMMENT: 
Values “1” to “4” are derived from T-MSIS. Value “N” indicates that the corresponding 
PRVDR_CLSFCTN_CD is derived from NPPES. 
The classification code values are in the PRVDR_CLSFCTN_CD
